producers.description: BlueEdge source archive. Delivered externally. Not a repo artifact.

producers.script: Unknown — intake contract scripts (not in scripts/pios/40.2/ scope)
producers.description: Archive extraction, canonical_repo population, intake manifests, source boundary documents. Consumed by Phase 1 (SHA256 check on archive) and Phase 2 (canonical_repo existence check).
Scripts exist in scripts/pios/40.x/ but are NOT invoked by run_client_pipeline.py. The orchestrator only verifies their outputs at Phase 3. Must be run externally before orchestrator invocation.

producers.script: Unknown — grounding pipeline scripts not in scope of current inspection
producers.description: ceu_grounding_registry.json. Required as input by phase_05_build_binding_envelope when fastapi_conformance_path is not set. Not validated by any orchestrator phase — assumed present.

producers.script: Unknown — integrated pipeline (run_end_to_end.py or equivalent, executed under different run context)
producers.description: grounding_state_v3.json + integration_validation.json. grounding_state_v3 is read by Phase 4 (readiness gate validation) and Phase 8a (evidence/coverage derivation). integration_validation is read by Phase 8a (admissibility proxy). Both must pre-exist.

producers.script: Conformance recompute contract scripts (external to run_client_pipeline.py scope)
producers.description: dom_path_domain_layer.json. Located in docs/ not clients/. Read by phase_05 (DOM majority-vote for CE node assignment) and phase_08a (canonical_topology domains[] construction). Not validated by any dedicated phase — assumed present.

Pre-computed canonical signal artifacts injected at Phases 5, 6+7, 8a via fastapi_conformance_path. This is the STAGE_NOT_AUTOMATED bypass for BlueEdge. Must be produced before orchestrator invocation.
Generates binding_envelope.json from CEU registry + DOM layer (native path) or from conformance artifact (conformance path). BlueEdge uses conformance path.
Generates 75.x/ and 41.x/ artifacts via run_end_to_end.py (native) or conformance path copy. BlueEdge uses conformance path.
Generates all 9 vault artifacts. Reads grounding_state_v3 (BE-12), dom_layer (BE-14), integration_validation (BE-13), and conformance signal_registry (BE-C5).
